title: El beso de ultratumba
writer: Alberto Ramírez de Aguilar, Carlos Ravelo, Carlos Toussaint
actors: Ana Bertha Lepe, Sergio Jurado, Alonso Castaño
plot: A newlywed couple finds themselves broke when the woman's father dies deeply in debt. Forced to sell their belongings, they move into a rundown house from which they get very bad vibes. It's not long before some very strange and d...
